intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Y2Mate.vc processes information when you access and use the website.
By using the service, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

content: Y2Mate.vc is a web-based technical tool that allows users to process publicly accessible YouTube links to download videos or extract audio.
The service does not require account registration and is designed to minimize data collection and processing.

list: User-submitted URLs and selected output options for processing purposes.
Temporary technical data generated during conversion, which is automatically deleted after completion.
Basic technical information such as IP address, browser type, device details, access timestamps, and error logs for security and reliability.
No user accounts or registration data.
No names, addresses, or personally identifiable profiles.
No long-term storage of processed content.

content: Y2Mate.vc uses minimal cookies or local storage strictly for essential functionality and basic user preferences.
We do not use cookies for behavioral advertising or cross-site tracking.
We may rely on third-party infrastructure providers such as hosting, content delivery networks, or security services.
These providers may process limited technical data in accordance with their own privacy policies.
Information is processed solely to operate, maintain, secure, and improve the service, prevent abuse, and comply with applicable legal obligations.
Temporary processing data is automatically deleted shortly after a conversion is completed.
Technical logs are retained only for a limited period for security, diagnostics, and abuse prevention.
We implement reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect information.
However, no method of transmission or storage can be guaranteed to be completely secure.
The service is not intended for children under the age of 13 (or the minimum age required by local law).
We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
Users are responsible for ensuring they have the legal right to process submitted content.
For copyright-related matters, please review our Copyright Claims page.
This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time.
Any changes will be posted on this page along with the updated revision date.
If you have questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact:
contact.y2matevc@gmail.com
Or visit our Contact page.

footer_note: This Privacy Policy is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice.
